mapper.select: select * from nx_customer_user_referral where invitee_user_id = #{value} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into nx_customer_user_referral (invitee_user_id, promotion_code_id, promotion_code_snapshot, source_owner_type, source_owner_id, promoter_id, community_id, commerce_id, share_entry, qualification_status, invalid_reason, reward_qualified, reward_rule_id, campaign_id, bind_time) values (#{inviteeUserId}, #{promotionCodeId}, #{promotionCodeSnapshot}, #{sourceOwnerType}, #{sourceOwnerId}, #{promoterId}, #{communityId}, #{commerceId}, #{shareEntry}, #{qualificationStatus}, #{invalidReason}, #{rewardQualified}, #{rewardRuleId}, #{campaignId}, #{bindTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from nx_customer_user_referral r2 where r2.qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED' and r2.source_owner_type = 'CUSTOMER_USER' and r2.source_owner_id in ( select r1.invitee_user_id from nx_customer_user_referral r1 where )

select r.*, u.nx_CU_user_id as invitee_nx_CU_user_id, u.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as invitee_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, u.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as invitee_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url, u.nx_CU_wx_phone_number as invitee_nx_CU_wx_phone_number, u.nx_CU_join_date as invitee_nx_CU_join_date, 0 as sub_referral_count from nx_customer_user_referral r inner join nx_customer_user u on u.nx_CU_user_id = r.invitee_user_id where r.source_owner_type = 'CUSTOMER_USER' and r.source_owner_id = #{sourceOwnerId} and r.qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED' and r.nx_customer_user_referral_id > #{lastReadReferralId} and r.bind_time >= #{displaySince} order by r.bind_time desc, r.nx_customer_user_referral_id desc limit 1
select max(nx_customer_user_referral_id) from nx_customer_user_referral where source_owner_type = 'CUSTOMER_USER' and source_owner_id = #{sourceOwnerId} and qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED'

select r.*, u.nx_CU_user_id as invitee_nx_CU_user_id, u.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as invitee_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, u.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as invitee_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url, u.nx_CU_wx_phone_number as invitee_nx_CU_wx_phone_number, u.nx_CU_join_date as invitee_nx_CU_join_date, (select count(*) from nx_customer_user_referral r2 where r2.source_owner_type = 'CUSTOMER_USER' and r2.source_owner_id = r.invitee_user_id and r2.qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED') as sub_referral_count from nx_customer_user_referral r inner join nx_customer_user u on u.nx_CU_user_id = r.invitee_user_id where r.source_owner_type = 'CUSTOMER_USER' and r.source_owner_id = #{sourceOwnerId} and r.qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED' order by r.bind_time desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select r2.*, invitee.nx_CU_user_id as invitee_nx_CU_user_id, invitee.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as invitee_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, invitee.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as invitee_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url, invitee.nx_CU_wx_phone_number as invitee_nx_CU_wx_phone_number, invitee.nx_CU_join_date as invitee_nx_CU_join_date, via.nx_CU_user_id as via_nx_CU_user_id, via.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as via_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, via.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as via_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url from nx_customer_user_referral r1 inner join nx_customer_user_referral r2 on r2.source_owner_type = 'CUSTOMER_USER' and r2.source_owner_id = r1.invitee_user_id and r2.qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED' inner join nx_customer_user invitee on invitee.nx_CU_user_id = r2.invitee_user_id inner join nx_customer_user via on via.nx_CU_user_id = r1.invitee_user_id where r1.source_owner_type = 'CUSTOMER_USER' and r1.source_owner_id = #{sourceOwnerId} and r1.qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED' order by r2.bind_time desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select r.*, u.nx_CU_user_id as invitee_nx_CU_user_id, u.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as invitee_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, u.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as invitee_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url, u.nx_CU_wx_phone_number as invitee_nx_CU_wx_phone_number, u.nx_CU_join_date as invitee_nx_CU_join_date, 0 as sub_referral_count from nx_customer_user_referral r inner join nx_customer_user u on u.nx_CU_user_id = r.invitee_user_id where r.source_owner_type = 'EXTERNAL_PROMOTER' and r.source_owner_id = #{promoterId} order by r.bind_time desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select r.*, u.nx_CU_user_id as invitee_nx_CU_user_id, u.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as invitee_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, u.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as invitee_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url, u.nx_CU_wx_phone_number as invitee_nx_CU_wx_phone_number, u.nx_CU_join_date as invitee_nx_CU_join_date, 0 as sub_referral_count from nx_customer_user_referral r inner join nx_customer_user u on u.nx_CU_user_id = r.invitee_user_id where r.source_owner_type = #{sourceOwnerType} and r.source_owner_id = #{sourceOwnerId} order by r.bind_time desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
